ab: Gaga sapah ka payi hug?
en: Is grandmother at home?

ab: Nii hini, ga mtaqi tqiyan na ka hiya.
en: Yes, she’s sleeping in her room.

ab: Gaga sapah ka payi hug?
en: Is grandmother at home?

ab: Ugat hini, hana wada ngangut ka hiya da, dhuq keeman ka miyah sapah.
ch: B:不在，她剛出去了，要晚上才回家。
en: No, she’s not. She just went out and will be back in the evening.

ab: Gaga sapah ka baki hug.
en: Is grandfather at home?

ab: Ga tgdha tntunan ka hiya, usa baraw miing hiya da.
ch: B:他在二樓，你上去找他吧。
en: He’s upstairs. You can go up and find him.

ab: Niqan seejiq ka sapah hug?
en: Is anyone at home?

ab: Kika Rudaw o, ini su qtai psiyaq da, embiyax su hug?
ch: B:是Rudaw阿，很久沒有看到你了，你好嗎?
en: It’s Rudaw. I haven’t seen you in a while! How have you been?

ab: Embiyax bi! Meyah ku miing pprngaw sunan.
en: I’m doing great! I came to chat with you.

ab: Gaga inu ka tama su hug?
en: Where is your father?

ab: Ga pcsiyus damat hpuyan ka hiya, saun mu mlawa.
ch: B:他在廚房炒菜，我去叫他。
en: He’s in the kitchen cooking. Let me go call him.

ab: Wada inu ka Iwal da?
en: Where did Iwal go?

ab: Wada qmrak biyi rudux hi da.
en: She went to the chicken coop to catch chickens.

ab: Baki, miyah nami da.
en: Grandfather, we’re here.

ab: Ungat sapah hini ka baki namu, gaga qmpahan na, taga miyah sapah hiya ka yamu ha.
ch: B:你們的爺爺不在家，他在田裡，你們在家等他回來吧。
en: Your grandfather is not at home. He’s in the field. Wait for him to come back.

ab: Miyah su da Swayi qbsuran tama!
en: Uncle, you’re here!

ab: Psiyaq ini qpita, mdakil su da.
en: I haven’t seen you in a while. You’ve grown taller.

ab: Mqaras bi qtaan misu miyah.
en: It’s so good to see you.

ab: Bgay namu kalat nii, psaay ska kulu huda.
ch: B:這是給你們的鳳梨，要放到冰箱裡。
en: Here’s a pineapple for you. Put it in the refrigerator.

ab: Masu psiyaq ini iyah, splawa mu kana miyah mkan nhapuy.
ch: A:這麼久沒來，我叫大家一起來吃飯。
en: It’s been a while. Let’s have a meal together.

ab: Ana qu wa , imah ku ucia kida, iyah ta pprngaw ruwan sapah.
ch: B:不用麻煩了，我喝茶就好，我們來客廳聊天。
en: No need to bother. I’ll just have tea. Let’s sit in the living room and chat.

ab: Mhuway su bi peekan knan, mha ku da.
ch: A:謝謝你的招待，我要回去了。
en: Thank you for your hospitality. I have to go now.

ab: Hana qrtan ka rudux nii, dsi musa qnhuway nanat mkan.
ch: B:這隻雞剛殺好，你帶回去慢慢吃。
en: This chicken was just freshly killed. Take it home and enjoy it slowly.
